summary: Testing iteration 3 completed successfully. All features from the recent update tested and working correctly: hard delete with confirmation dialogs, toggle active with eye icons, default study time 16:00-17:00, study-type-specific exclusion dates, enhanced reports with 3 tabs.
passed_tests: Superadmin login (joachim.vaneckenrode@rhizo.be) - successful
Dashboard displays correctly with stats
Admin menu expands to show all submenu items
Classes page - list loads with 102 classes
Classes - toggle active works (eye/eye-off icons)
Classes - hard delete shows confirmation dialog with 'Klas definitief verwijderen?'
Classes - confirmation dialog has 'Annuleren' and 'Verwijderen' buttons
Study Types page - displays 7 study types
Study Types - default start time is 16:00 (verified in create dialog)
Study Types - default end time is 17:00 (verified in create dialog)
Study Types - all existing types show 16:00-17:00
Study Types - toggle active and hard delete buttons present
Exclusion Dates page - loads correctly
Exclusion Dates - create dialog has study type checkboxes (7 types)
Exclusion Dates - selecting types shows '1 studie(s) geselecteerd' note
Exclusion Dates - info text explains specific vs all exclusions
Reports page - 3 tabs: Overzicht, Per leerling, Per klas
Reports - Overzicht tab shows summary stats and charts
Reports - Per leerling tab shows student attendance with percentages
Reports - Per klas tab shows class attendance with percentages
Reports - Export buttons present for both attendance and registrations CSV
Backend API: POST /api/auth/login - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/classes?includeInactive=true - 200 OK
Backend API: PATCH /api/classes/{id}/toggle-active - 200 OK
Backend API: DELETE /api/classes/{id} (hard delete) - 200 OK
Backend API: POST /api/study-types with 16:00-17:00 defaults - 200 OK
Backend API: DELETE /api/study-types/{id} (hard delete) - 200 OK
Backend API: POST /api/exclusion-dates with excludedStudyTypeIds - 200 OK
Backend API: PUT /api/exclusion-dates/{id} - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/reports/summary - 200 OK
Backend API: GET /api/reports/attendance-detail - 200 OK with byStudent, byClass, byStudyType
Backend API: GET /api/reports/export - 200 OK
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Dashboard still shows some study moments with 15:30-17:00 times - these are likely existing generated moments, not new defaults. The default for new study types is correctly 16:00-17:00
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing data used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core admin features tested. Classes, StudyTypes, ExclusionDates, and Reports pages fully verified. Hard delete with confirmation dialogs working. Toggle active with eye icons working. Default study time 16:00-17:00 confirmed. Study-type-specific exclusions in exclusion dates working. Reports page has 3 tabs with attendance data and CSV export buttons.
